description:
Cover authenticated dashboard states that depend on MDI mirrors, fresh MDI reads, or embedded workflow URLs.

**Scope**
- Create deterministic MDI fixture states for pending, approved, declined, action-needed, billing issue, unavailable/maintenance, and workflow-link cases.
- Verify dashboard status, billing cue placement, support pathways, and embedded/link-out workflow affordances selected by T-079.
- Ensure clinical messages, files, and workflow detail remain in MDI-owned surfaces or mocked embedded URLs unless a future decision expands Apoth storage.
- Include browser assertions for retry/refresh behavior when MDI is unavailable.

**Acceptance**
- Dashboard E2E specs cover all launch status states named in T-063.
- MDI embedded workflow links use safe test URLs and do not leak clinical detail into local app state.
- Maintenance/unavailable behavior is visible, recoverable, and does not expose raw vendor errors to patients.
- Specs run against mocked MDI responses locally and can be narrowed for staging smoke.
title: MDI-backed dashboard and care-workflow E2E specs
